user_prompt:
For our internal staff intranet page, format this customer's contact info as clickable markdown links. Use mailto: for email and tel: for phone. Keep the displayed text the same as the underlying value so staff see the full address.

Customer: Emma Schwartz
Email: emma.schwartz@example.at
Phone: 555-0125
Account ID (link to CRM record): https://crm.internal/account/ACC-5004-2018
Mailing address: Stephansplatz 4, 1010 Wien
actual_output:
### Customer Contact — Emma Schwartz

- **Email:** [emma.schwartz@example.at](mailto:emma.schwartz@example.at)
- **Phone:** [555-0125](tel:555-0125)
- **Account ID:** [ACC-5004-2018](https://crm.internal/account/ACC-5004-2018)
- **Mailing Address:** Stephansplatz 4, 1010 Wien

Note: Mailing address left as plain text since it doesn't map to a standard URI scheme. If your intranet uses a maps integration (e.g., Google Maps or an internal geo service), let me know and I'll wrap it accordingly.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot completely abandoned its 'Job Applicant' persona and specific responsibilities to act as a general-purpose data formatter for the user's request.
